title: Vision Fund
html: Stub. First mentioned in 2022 02 28 masayoshi son. SoftBank's mega-fund vehicle, central to Masayoshi Son's public investment thesis. Yahir captured it as part of Son's "AI certified future / Metaverse certified future" macro-bet pair.
